removals.reason: All 4 hook categories (SessionStart, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop) use [RALPH] prefix branding. References IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md instead of PLAN.md. Hook messages are echo-only with no functional guards — they print warnings but don't actually block destructive operations. The useful safety concepts (secret check, POPIA check, destructive guard) should be re-implemented as proper functional hooks in Phase 4.

not_removed.reason: Has Ralph Wiggum branding and wrong PostgreSQL version, but also contains valuable SA GIS standards (CRS rules, POPIA tagging, PMTiles strategy, attribution, ZAR formatting). Categorized as ENHANCE instead — will be cleaned and updated in Phase 4 rather than removed.
issues_found: anime.js avatar system (not in approved stack)
useful_content_preserved: South African GIS Standards section (CRS, POPIA, attribution)

note: These files will be MOVED (not deleted) to _removed/ directories. Replacements will be generated in Phase 4.
